data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback).
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-part MIME requirement, but the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm its implementation. While the linked use case mentions the need for multi-part MIME, there are no specific details or evidence to support that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of multi-part MIME (HTML + plain text fallback) implementation.
